scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --workspace apps/backend run dev" "npm --workspace apps/frontend run dev"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.tunnel: npm run build && cross-env PaperForge_TUNNEL=localtunnel node apps/backend/src/index.js
scripts.tunnel:cf: npm run build && cross-env PaperForge_TUNNEL=cloudflared node apps/backend/src/index.js
scripts.tunnel:ngrok: npm run build && cross-env PaperForge_TUNNEL=ngrok node apps/backend/src/index.js
